hero.title: 半挂车研发制造专家
hero.description: T700C高强度钢材 · 全系定制化生产 · 品质铸就未来
hero.description_en: T700C High-Strength Steel · Fully Customized Production · Quality Builds the Future

about.title: 关于欧阳聚德
about.subtitle: 做客户值得信任、员工值得自豪的企业
about.subtitle_en: A Company Trusted by Customers, Proud for Employees
about.para1: 湖北欧阳聚德汽车有限公司位于湖北省枣阳市，专业从事半挂车的研发、生产与销售。公司拥有现代化生产车间，配备完整的专业化生产流水线，产品服务全国各地货运物流、工程建设等行业客户。
about.para1_en: Hubei Ouyang Jude Automobile Co., Ltd., located in Zaoyang, Hubei Province, specializes in the R&D, manufacturing and sales of semi-trailers. Equipped with modern workshops and professional production lines, our products serve freight logistics and construction industries nationwide.
about.para2: 公司采用T700C超高强度钢材，配合先进焊接工艺，实现整车轻量化与高强度的完美结合。坚持品质铸就未来的发展理念，以技术创新为驱动，持续提升产品质量和服务水平。
about.para2_en: Using T700C ultra-high-strength steel with advanced welding technology, we achieve the perfect balance of lightweight design and high strength. Committed to quality-driven development, we continuously improve product quality and service through technological innovation.

about_page.ab-hero-eyebrow: 关于我们 · 企业概况
about_page.ab-hero-title_en: Built on Trust, Driven by Quality
about_page.ab-hero-tagline: 做客户值得信任、员工值得自豪的企业
about_page.ab-hero-tagline_en: A Company Trusted by Customers, Proud for Employees
about_page.ab-mission-headline: 扎根千古帝乡湖北枣阳 · 6 大系列覆盖主流车型 · T700C 高强钢 · 全国 30+ 省服务网络
about_page.ab-mission-headline_en: Founded 2017 in Zaoyang · 6 Series Covering All Major Trailers · T700C High-Strength Steel · 30+ Provinces Served
about_page.ab-give-back-1-body: 持续向枣阳本地及周边县乡的助学、救灾与敬老项目捐赠——做的是常态投入,不是一次性运动。
about_page.ab-give-back-1-body_en: Sustained donations to local education, disaster relief, and elderly care programs in Zaoyang and surrounding counties — quietly recurring, not one-off campaigns.
about_page.ab-give-back-2-body: 公司设有活跃的党建组织,党员志愿者队伍常年参与社区服务——从义务献血到防汛救灾应急响应。
about_page.ab-give-back-2-body_en: Active Party-building organization within the company. Party-member volunteer team participates in community service throughout the year — from blood drives to flood emergency response.
about_page.ab-give-back-3-body: 为枣阳本地提供 200+ 工作岗位,长期采购周边钢材、配件、物流——每一台车出厂,都拉动一条上游生计。
about_page.ab-give-back-3-body_en: 200+ local jobs in Zaoyang. Working with regional steel, parts, and logistics suppliers — every trailer that rolls out the gate carries dozens of upstream livelihoods with it.
about_page.ab-cta-slogan: 聚德同行 · 逐梦前行
about_page.ab-cta-desc: 从规格表到交付,每一步都有真人对接
about_page.ab-cta-desc_en: From spec sheet to delivery — every step you'll have a real person to talk to
about_page.ab-cta-tagline_en: Jude World — Bringing Together People of Virtue
about_page.ab-timeline-desc: 一台车、一个客户、一个里程碑,我们走到今天
about_page.ab-timeline-desc_en: Built one trailer, one customer, one milestone at a time
about_page.ab-tech-desc: 每年 300 万元研发投入,两个技术部门,三所合作院校,一个目标:把研究转化为可靠性。
about_page.ab-tech-desc_en: 3M+ RMB invested in R&D each year. Two technical departments. Three university partners. One target: turning research into reliability.
about_page.ab-adv-desc: 回购、转介、提车速度——客户用脚投票的三件事
about_page.ab-adv-desc_en: Repeat orders, referrals, and the speed at which a custom trailer becomes yours
